Useful phrases: 'Cat costa?' = How much?, 'Unde este...?' = Where is...?, 'Scuze' = Sorry! 📖
Romanian pronunciation tip: it's mostly phonetic! 'Ce faci?' (che fachi) = How are you? 🗣️
Cuvinte utile: 'Buna ziua' = Good day, 'La revedere' = Goodbye, 'Noroc' = Cheers! (also means luck!) 🍻
